items.verse: وَلَا تَأْكُلُوا۟ مِمَّا لَمْ يُذْكَرِ ٱسْمُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ وَإِنَّهُۥ لَفِسْقٌۭ ۗ وَإِنَّ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينَ لَيُوحُونَ إِلَىٰٓ أَوْلِيَآئِهِمْ لِيُجَـٰدِلُوكُمْ ۖ وَإِنْ أَطَعْتُمُوهُمْ إِنَّكُمْ لَمُشْرِكُونَ
items.verseEn: And do not eat of that upon which the name of Allāh has not been mentioned, for indeed, it is grave disobedience. And indeed do the devils inspire their allies [among men] to dispute with you. And if you were to obey them, indeed, you would be associators [of others with Him].

items.verse: وَلَوْلَآ إِذْ سَمِعْتُمُوهُ قُلْتُم مَّا يَكُونُ لَنَآ أَن نَّتَكَلَّمَ بِهَـٰذَا سُبْحَـٰنَكَ هَـٰذَا بُهْتَـٰنٌ عَظِيمٌۭ
items.verseEn: And why, when you heard it, did you not say, "It is not for us to speak of this. Exalted are You, [O Allāh]; this is a great slander"?
And they used to persist in the great violation,

items.verse: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبَـٰٓئِرَ ٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْفَوَٰحِشَ إِلَّا ٱللَّمَمَ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ وَٰسِعُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ ۚ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِكُمْ إِذْ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِذْ أَنتُمْ أَجِنَّةٌۭ فِى بُطُونِ أُمَّهَـٰتِكُمْ ۖ فَلَا تُزَكُّوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ ۖ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰٓ
items.verseEn: Those who avoid the major sins and immoralities, only [committing] slight ones. Indeed, your Lord is vast in forgiveness. He was most knowing of you when He produced you from the earth and when you were fetuses in the wombs of your mothers. So do not claim yourselves to be pure; He is most knowing of who fears Him.

categories.name: أَوْصَافُ الْجِبَالِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
categories.nameEn: Words describing the state of mountains on the Day of Judgment

items.verseEn: And when the mountains are removed
And when the mountains are blown away

items.verse: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَثِيبًۭا مَّهِيلًا
items.verseEn: On the Day the earth and the mountains will convulse and the mountains will become a heap of sand pouring down.
And the mountains are broken down, crumbling

categories.name: كَلِمَاتٌ تَصِفُ التَّغَيُّرَ الْعَنِيفَ لِلسَّمَاءِ وَالنُّجُومِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
categories.nameEn: Terms describing the violent alteration of the sky and stars on the Day of Judgment

items.verseEn: And when the stars fall, dispersing,
And when the sky is stripped away
And when the heaven is opened
On the Day the heaven will sway with circular motion

categories.name: أَسْمَاءٌ تَأْتِي مُضَافًا إِلَيْهِ بَعْدَ كَلِمَةِ 'ذُو'
categories.nameEn: Nouns that follow 'dhū' (owner of) or its variations in a possessive construction

items.verse: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
items.verseEn: And there will remain the Face of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.

items.verse: غَافِرِ ٱلذَّنۢبِ وَقَابِلِ ٱلتَّوْبِ شَدِيدِ ٱلْعِقَابِ ذِى ٱلطَّوْلِ ۖ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ إِلَيْهِ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
items.verseEn: The forgiver of sin, acceptor of repentance, severe in punishment, owner of abundance. There is no deity except Him; to Him is the destination.

items.verse: فَلَا تَحْسَبَنَّ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِفَ وَعْدِهِۦ رُسُلَهُۥٓ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَزِيزٌۭ ذُو ٱنتِقَامٍۢ
items.verseEn: So never think that Allāh will fail in His promise to His messengers. Indeed, Allāh is Exalted in Might and Owner of Retribution.

harf.arabicVerse: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفْسُهُۥ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
harf.verse: 50:16 — And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein.

deduction.title: The Perishable Paradise
deduction.intro: Before you stands a soul who was granted immense blessings from Allah—lush gardens, flowing rivers, and abundant fruit. Yet, in the face of this prosperity, a test of faith and gratitude arose. This individual's response to their wealth led to a powerful lesson about the true nature of worldly possessions and the eternal power of Allah. Can you uncover the identity of this figure whose story is a timeless warning?
clues: I was blessed with more wealth and more followers than my companion.
I walked into my garden, wronging my own soul with my boastful attitude.
I declared that I believed my prosperity would never end, and I even expressed doubt about the Final Hour.
My righteous companion advised me to remember Allah upon entering my garden, saying 'Ma sha' Allah, la quwwata illa billah' (What Allah willed has occurred; there is no power except in Allah).
A calamity from the sky struck my property overnight, and all my bounty was ruined.
I was left wringing my hands in regret over all I had spent, as my garden now lay collapsed on its trellises, wishing I had never associated anyone with my Lord.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: The Owner of the Two Gardens
identity.answer: The Owner of the Two Gardens

trial.label: What Was My Primary Test?
options: Arrogance in the face of wealth
Being swallowed by the earth with my treasures
Building a golden calf for worship
Surviving a great flood on an ark
trial.answer: Arrogance in the face of wealth

location.label: What Was the Key Element in My Story?

outcome.label: What Was the Result of My Actions?
options: I was granted control over the wind
My wealth was given to the poor by my command
I was exiled to a remote island

deduction.arabic: وَأُحِيطَ بِثَمَرِهِۦ فَأَصْبَحَ يُقَلِّبُ كَفَّيْهِ عَلَىٰ مَآ أَنفَقَ فِيهَا وَهِىَ خَاوِيَةٌ عَلَىٰ عُرُوشِهَا وَيَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُشْرِكْ بِرَبِّىٓ أَحَدًۭا
deduction.verse: And his fruits were encompassed [by ruin], so he began to turn his hands about [in dismay] over what he had spent on it, while it had collapsed upon its trellises, and said, "Oh, I wish I had not associated with my Lord anyone." (18:42)

translations: Recite what has been revealed to you of the Book
and establish the prayer Indeed the prayer prevents
from the immorality and evil deeds and surely (the) remembrance (of) Allah
(is) greatest And Allah knows what you do
scramble.hint: This verse describes a key preventative function of one of the pillars of Islam.
scramble.arabic: ٱتْلُ مَآ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْكَ مِنَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ تَنْهَىٰ عَنِ ٱلْفَحْشَآءِ وَٱلْمُنكَرِ ۗ وَلَذِكْرُ ٱللَّهِ أَكْبَرُ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مَا تَصْنَعُونَ
words: ٱتْلُ مَآ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْكَ مِنَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ
scramble.verseEn: Recite, [O Muḥammad], what has been revealed to you of the Book and establish prayer. Indeed, prayer prohibits immorality and wrongdoing, and the remembrance of Allāh is greater. And Allāh knows that which you do.
